🚨 Attention!! Attention!! 

To the citizens of America: Fraudsters impersonating public figures to push crypto scams and fake investments will be tracked and prosecuted. 
Do not trust unsolicited DMs, suspicious links, or “guaranteed” returns. Report and block scam accounts immediately.

The SEC is suing Nathan Fuller of Texas for an alleged $12.3 million crypto scheme. Fuller is accused of defrauding about 150 investors using fake AI trading bots and guaranteed returns. Investor funds were allegedly misused for personal expenses and Ponzi-like payments. #crypto #News
➤ The SEC has charged a Texas man, Nathan Fuller, with a $12.3 million crypto fraud involving fake AI trading bots and promises of guaranteed high returns.

SEC charges a Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots. This serves as a reminder to be wary of guaranteed high returns; genuine opportunities rarely involve such hype. #Crypto #NFTs #Cybersecurity #AI

Ohio man gets 9 years for $10M #Bitcoin Ponzi scheme. Rathnakishore Giri promised guaranteed returns but funded a lavish lifestyle & early investors. Crypto crime losses hit $11B in 2025. ⚖️ #CryptoNews #Fraud

How to Spot Crypto Scams: Red Flags Every Investor Must Know

1. Unrealistic Guarantees of Returns One of the most glaring red flags in crypto investing is a promise of guaranteed high returns with little or no risk. Legitimate investments carry inherent volatility; no reputable project can…

How to Spot a Crypto Scam: Red Flags and Safety Tips

How to Spot a Crypto Scam: Red Flags and Safety Tips 1. Unrealistic ROI Promises and Guaranteed Returns The most glaring red flag in cryptocurrency is the promise of guaranteed, high-yield returns. Legitimate investments carry risk; volatility…

Common Crypto Scams to Avoid as a New Investor

1. The "Impossible" Returns of Ponzi and Pyramid Schemes Many newcomers mistake crypto’s volatility for guaranteed profit. Scammers exploit this by promising fixed, high-yield returns (e.g., “10% daily”) through automated trading bots or obscure DeFi…

Hi everyone, so can we talk for a moment about Investment Scams?

Specifically "Mentor / Coach" types you might find in YouTube or TikTok

They're everywhere and, for the most part, shysters!

They offer courses on how to WIN BIG and EARN £££s on stocks, shares and crypto

Guaranteed returns!! #Scam

Pushing back on this framing: "suicidal" is fear-mongering. More importantly, unsolicited crypto/FX schemes with guaranteed returns are almost universally scams. Legitimate opportunities don't recruit via posts like this. Due diligence is non-negotiable.

These ruthless compounds (Tai Chang 1.0 to 3.0) specialize in fake crypto investment frauds, sucking billions from Americans — especially seniors — with phony trading apps and “guaranteed returns” that vanish overnight.

Guess Harvard and Oxford missed the opportunity of offering those “clairvoyant”degrees on Economics.

I mean, who among us remembers the “humble” prediction on the “guaranteed” returns on Crypto that, instead of coming to pass, plummeted? Guess it’s not humility what he has but some serious delusion

HK Police warn of "AI Quantified Profit" crypto scam after a woman lost HK$7.7M. Scammers lured victims with promises of guaranteed high returns via AI trading. Police caution against schemes with "impossible triangle" promises: high returns, low risk, low entry. #cryptoscam #HKPolice #cybersecurity

🤨15 seconds is generous. Most scams fail the first check: “Does this promise guaranteed returns?” Real crypto doesn’t guarantee anything; that is the point. Add a second check: “Can I verify the contract address on‑chain?” If no → scam.

❇️ Claims of high, guaranteed returns over short periods. 
❇️ Aggressive "limited time" sale tactics

Binance just dropped new market maker rules! 🛡️ Token issuers must disclose MM info, no profit-sharing or guaranteed returns allowed, and lending agreements need clear purpose. Violations mean swift action, including blacklisting non-compliant MMs. #Binance #Crypto #MarketMaking

Binance mandates token issuers disclose market maker info, banning profit-sharing/guaranteed returns for MMs. Token lending agreements need clear use specification. Violators face swift action, including blacklisting. #Binance #Crypto #MarketMaking

Boris Johnson calls Bitcoin a "huge Ponzi scheme." Michael Saylor disagrees, arguing Bitcoin lacks a central operator and guaranteed returns, unlike typical Ponzi schemes. Saylor stresses Bitcoin's decentralized nature, driven by code and market demand.

#crypto #blockchain #news

Boris Johnson calls Bitcoin a "Ponzi scheme." MicroStrategy CEO Michael Saylor refutes this, highlighting Bitcoin's decentralization, lack of issuer, and no guaranteed returns. "A Ponzi scheme requires a central party... Bitcoin has no issuer," he states. #Bitcoin #Crypto

Warning Signs:
• Promises of guaranteed returns
• Pressure to invest quickly
• Crypto-only payments

📆 Scamiversary: Lessons from the Past 📆  
On this day in 2018, BitConnect abruptly shut down its lending platform wiping out millions and turning its infamous logo into a crypto meme of failure 😬 Stay informed and never trust guaranteed returns 🎯

You deposit crypto (often starting small). The fake platform shows HUGE fake profits to build trust. You're encouraged to "invest" more for even bigger "guaranteed" returns. This is the "pig butchering" phase, like fattening the account before the slaughter.

Crypto custody firms face a tough road ahead. Experts predict many will fail by 2026 as competition rises & valuations fall. Only those offering real value & returns are expected to survive the next market downturn. Bitcoin holdings are up, but growth isn’t guaranteed. #crypto #custody

📆 Scamiversary: Lessons from the Past 📆  
On Dec 26 2017 BitConnect abruptly shut down its lending platform wiping out millions in user funds 🤯 Remember to always question promises of guaranteed crypto returns

⚠️ Binance warns of rising “FXRP XRP staking” scams on YouTube & search engines! 🚨 Scammers promise 1.5-1.8% monthly returns but steal your funds. They block withdrawals & demand more money before disappearing. ❌ Only use official channels & beware of guaranteed returns! #crypto #scamalert #XRP

📆 Scamiversary: Lessons from the Past 📆  
On Dec 11, 2017, BitConnect shut down after months of hype, wiping out billions and shocking the crypto world 🚨 A brutal reminder to never trust promises of guaranteed returns 💡

Spain’s Civil Guard Arrests Alleged Leader of 260M Euro Crypto-Linked Ponzi Scheme. The alleged Ponzi scheme attracted over 3,000 victims by offering guaranteed returns on contracts tied to various assets.

🚨 Spanish police arrested the head of “CryptoSpain” (Madeira Invest Club) for allegedly running a €260M Ponzi scheme. 3,000+ victims were promised guaranteed returns in crypto, real estate & more, but investigations found no real investments. New money paid old investors. #ponzischeme #crypto

🇪🇸 authorities arrested a suspect in a €260M crypto Ponzi scheme ("Madeira Invest Club"). 3,000+ victims were lured with guaranteed returns on art, cars, whiskey, real estate & crypto. Investigation spanned 10+ countries via Europol. Highlights risks of unregulated crypto investments.

Coinbase launches its US Bitcoin Yield Fund (USCBYF) for eligible US investors! 🚀 Earn potential returns beyond holding BTC through private credit & basis trading. Invest with BTC, USD, or USDC. IRA access planned for 2026. Returns aren't guaranteed. #Bitcoin #Coinbase

Taiwan police busted a $4.1M crypto scam using “U coin.” Victims were lured with guaranteed returns, then pressured to invest more or pay large “margins.” A money laundering network linked to Taizhou, China was uncovered. Investigation ongoing. #crypto #scam #taiwan

Crypto Ponzi mastermind Eddy Alexandre ordered to pay $228M in restitution! His EminiFX platform defrauded 25K+ investors with fake tech promises. He admitted guilt, got 9 yrs jail & took $15M for himself. Beware of scams: avoid guaranteed returns & recruitment pressure! #cryptoscam #fraud

Folks, warn your families about crypto scams… early and often. Why? Well, we were just served a YouTube crypto grift ad that used an AI generated video avatar of Canada’s “AI Minister” Evan Solomon attesting to an “investment” with guaranteed returns that’s “approved by the government”. Gross.
Set up a crypto IPO and tell them it's invitation-only for elite brain next-gen pioneers with guaranteed 100x returns.

🚩 Red Flag: “Guaranteed Returns”

In crypto, if it’s risk-free and too good to be true—it’s a scam. Full stop.

DYOR. Stay sharp. Stay rich. 🧠💸

Download Crypto Tracker for free tips (link in bio).

Amboss launches self-custodial Bitcoin yield product 'Rails' on Lightning Network. Earn returns providing liquidity via routing/leasing (not guaranteed). Offers: Rails LP (min 1 BTC/1yr lock) for businesses/HNWIs, and a liquidity subscription for merchants (from 0.5%).

How to spot a crypto scam 🧵
1)Promises “guaranteed” returns
2)No whitepaper or working product
3)Anonymous founders
4)Pushes urgency
5)No audit or transparency

heads up that fake "your account has been suspended!" messages are going around on ko-fi. 

Claiming to be from "Administrator" but they leave these phony messages in your inbox and as comments on your art, on your still-active profiles 🙄🙄🙄

Obviously, do not click the link

‼ IF YOU USE @ko-fi.com ‼

Recently, you may have gotten an email from """Ko-Fi""" explaining how "your account has been suspended" and you "need to verify payment information to continue using Ko-fi"....

DO NOT CLICK ANYTHING IN THAT EMAIL.

psa, there's a "wuh oh you better verify your account or else >:(" scam going around on ko-fi.
www.reddit.com/r/Kofi/comme...

Don't click any dodgy links alleging a short window of time to act in either emails, DMs or otherwise, its designed to make you panic and not assess first.
#ko-fi

IMPORTANT ACCOUNT UPDATE: @ko-fi.com has been either hacked, or is currently running a horrible scam. They took $300 from me today.

My @throne.com is the best possible way to send tips and gifts moving forward, I'm so grateful for your patience as I build my own website and navigate this crisis.

"Hey, we were unable to process the payment for your __ account, therefore it has been suspended. To resume use, please use the link provided to update the payment information."

Oh no. Let me hurry & click this link to provide my card info for this thing I have never had.

If you are an artist or photographer with a #FineArtAmerica account, be aware of this spam email technique. Someone is posting a message on your artwork that states your account has been "suspended" due to unusual activity and you need to click the link to verify your account. DO NOT ENGAGE.

This is a scam.
Do not click the link.
Just block and/or report.
Beware of this account, they will send you a message via DMs telling you that your account has been suspended and you need to click on a link. DO NOT FALL FOR IT! IT'S A SCAM!
I just got one of them spam messages "Your account has been temporarily suspended." Keep an eye out in your own messages, and don't click on any links!
Just got a nice fake message claiming my account was restricted and was going to be permanently deleted unless I click this dodgy looking link RIGHT NOW. Skeptical eye on the inbox, folks.

i was JUST reading about it 😭

if you receive this type of dm, please don't click the link! just report and block them!

Got this scam in a chat request in my DMs. What a weird scam. They sent a chat request instead of just sending a DM and then it shows their handle which is clearly not a dev or team one. Anyways don't fall for these or click on anything if you get one.

Hey, just a heads up – I just got this message!
Please be careful with any link you click on and don’t fall for panic traps like this or others! Block and report and do nothing else!

Reminder to never trust random messages with links in them and never click those!!⚠️
I got one of those "your account has been suspended" type of message for the first time, claiming to from the bluesky support account.

Huh. Weird that either @support.bsky.team or @safety.bsky.app sent me this message from a generic random handle instead of the official one. Well, I'll definitely be sure to click this obfuscated URL in the chat then...oops I accidentally blocked and reported the account and deleted the chat. Darn.

eu cliquei no link e recebi a mensagem à direita

detalhe: minha conta está funcionando normalmente

new scam goin around! this seems pretty hard to fall fur, just a quick check of the account reveals that its not followed by Any of the official bluesky accounts, but i figured id warn y'all against it anyway! dont click any suspicious links you get! keep yourselves safe!

If you receive a DM telling you that your Bluesky account has been temporarily suspended due to security-related restrictions DO NOT CLICK ANY LINKS ATTACHED TO THE MESSAGE! Report and block!
Be careful you guys. Spammers are starting to pretend to be Bluesky support telling your account has been suspended. Do NOT click the links they show. Report and block these fuckers

just got my first scam DM on bluesky!! wow!

classic "your account has been suspended, click on this suspicious link to fix it" deal. be careful everyone :)

Ok I got scared for a sec, but then I realized it's not even the official account, it's literally been created 3 hours ago

Anyways, time to report

new scam just dropped! BlueSky will NOT DM you like that 

never click on a link unless it's from someone you trust (especially if it's attempting to evoke a panic response)
Look out for scam messages like this and do NOT click any links.
Tricking me into thinking that someone had reached out for a commission right after opening them stings more than attempting to scam me, not gonna lie.

Head's up there is a Bluesky ban scam going around. This account just joined 40 mins ago and send me this DM.

DO NOT CLICK THE LINK.

Bluesky would NEVER send a DM like this and make you scared. This would come through email and would have a more professional email than this.

Stay safe!

hey fam heads up: there’s spammy fake bsky accounts dming to say your account has been suspended. and like, obviously that’s not true or you wouldn’t be able to access it but regardless do not click the links!!! block and report! stay safe!

just got this message in my chat requests a few minutes ago - it's completely fake. if you get a message like this, report and block and definitely don't click the link

bsky team doesn't DM you to tell your account is suspended, you wouldn't be able to check your DMs if it was

i'm so thankful i have common sense not to click random links in chat messages i get out of the blue bc y'all scammers dumb as hell thinking people aren't gonna know you're trying to scam them when you send a dm saying "your bluesky account has been suspended, appeal by clicking this link"
